atk1-text: Roll KEN + TR vs. KEN + SR against an adjacent insect. The target gains Wounds for each Net Success.
atk2-text: Roll SPE + TR vs. SPE + SR against an adjacent insect. The target gains Wounds for each Net Success.
atk3-text: Roll WEB + TR vs. SPE + SR against an Insect within Web hexes. If an Enemy, target gains Wounds and Immobile for each Net Success. If an Ally, target reduces Bleeding for each Net Success.
